Off Calendar Sep-27-2011 Continued To Dec-13-11 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 610

Compromise Of A Disabled Adult
Off Calendar Jul-26-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: J. Willis McGhee, CSR: B. Fields, CSR #7235

Sara M. Peters, Esq. for Petitioner(s): Mimi Lowe, as guardian ad litem for and with: Wei Cheng Wang, a disabled adult Claimant.
Petitioner was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved against defendant, Kindred Nursing Centers West dba Lawton Healthcare Center.
Attorney's fees: $66,081.07
Reimbursement for Medical Expenses 42,342.40
Medical Expenses $8,915.00
A net balance of $142,661.53 to be a single check payable to the Wei Cheng and S.K. Wang Trust.
The matter is continued to October 27, 2011 at 9 a.m. Dept. 514 for proof of receipt.
